claims.claim_text: Multimodal reasoning can be applied in customer support chatbots to analyze text and image inputs simultaneously.
Code generation capabilities enable software development tools to automatically generate code snippets based on natural language prompts.
Real-time search functionality allows users to query databases and receive updated results instantaneously.
Voice synthesis technology can be used in virtual assistants to provide more natural and engaging interactions with users.
Video understanding capabilities enable the analysis and tagging of video content for enhanced searchability and categorization.
